evals.name: search-workflow
evals.prompt: Analyze staging videos for Duplessis Orphans
evals.expected_output: Full search workflow: embed, extract queries from shotlist, search, refine weak queries, present segment table

assertions.text: Shotlist loaded and shot IDs referenced
Weak queries identified and refinement attempted
Segment table presented with Video/Shot/Timestamps columns

evals.name: discovery-workflow
evals.prompt: Discover what's in the Duplessis footage
evals.expected_output: Discovery workflow: auto-generate taxonomy, classify, cluster, present inventory

assertions.text: Project taxonomy auto-generated from project context (not manual)
Categories are project-specific (orphanage, Quebec, religious, etc.)
Category inventory presented with frame counts

evals.name: evaluation-template
evals.prompt: Generate a ground truth template for Duplessis
evals.expected_output: Template generated with correct video list, user instructed to fill in DaVinci Resolve

assertions.text: User instructed about DaVinci Resolve or manual review

evals.name: adhoc-search
evals.prompt: Search the footage for scenes of institutional buildings and religious ceremonies
evals.expected_output: User queries used directly (not extracted from shotlist), search executed

assertions.text: Queries derived from user input, not shotlist
Results presented in a readable format

evals.name: query-refinement
evals.prompt: The search for 'bureaucratic menace' scored 0.12. Can you refine and retry?
evals.expected_output: Concrete visual alternatives generated, re-search attempted

assertions.text: Alternatives are concrete visual descriptions (not abstract)
